title: ficus alba var. gossypina
intro: Ficus alba var. gossypina, also known as the White Ficus or Rock Ficus, is a variety of the Ficus alba tree, native to China and widely cultivated in Asia for its unique appearance and medicinal properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds that possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. The health benefits of Ficus alba var. gossypina include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and possess anti-cancer properties, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to promote overall well-being and vitality when consumed in moderation.
